source: live CDP getComputedStyle on https://m.bunjang.co.kr/ — fontFamily aggregated across 211 sampled DOM nodes (desktop + mobile)

stack.rationale: Pretendard is the de-facto Korean web/app body face — open-source, optimized for hangul + latin mixing. Bunjang exclusively serves Pretendard Variable for crisp weight transitions (400 body → 500 secondary → 700 price emphasis) without round-tripping additional font files.
stack._note: no Apple SD Gothic Neo, no Noto Sans KR, no custom display face. The entire brand voice rides on Pretendard's weight axis.

weight-roles.400: body, link, CTA label, search input
weight-roles.500: secondary body, product title (in cards), meta

16px.role: default body / CTA label (400) and price (700)

letter-spacing: browser default (normal) for all observed nodes — Bunjang does not tighten or loosen the hangul stem
_self-hosted: Pretendard Variable is loaded from a Bunjang CDN host (likely static.bunjang.co.kr) — verify via Network panel for exact .woff2 URL
